speaker: MATT
raw_text: Where you're currently positioned, I would like you all to roll initiative before we get to your round, just so we have it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What do we see, though?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys see the faint appearance of some sort of a flying creature, very small, emerge from the tunnel that had recently expelled all this dust and smoke.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin size or smaller?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin size. (humming) It hovers in the air in a few places, and then locks itself over here onto this far wall, on a higher perch.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fucking bugs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you see that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think I saw that. Did you see that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I saw that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (snarl) Another moment passes, and the gnolls relax. You watch as the immediate dread of the recent explosion sound, the shocking and rocking of the room, seems to have passed over them. They both go back to paying attention to their recent vicinity, which includes the small child, which is still quietly sobbing in the painful grasp of this large curled gnoll hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: On the count of three?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, are we just going to attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We should distract them--!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Radiant blast!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sacred Flame, I mean.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. The ones who are making the initial strike on this--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I could distract them or something first!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Eldritch Blast for me, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will also do that as well, following suit with everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, are things happening?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't hit the kid!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We can't see! Do you have your lights?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, you don't see anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The ones who can see in the dark right now, which would be the four of you, you guys get a round of attack on this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: If I can have you roll initiative when you get settled in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (rasping) Next time I'm going to really hurt you! I said that in Infernal.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Which one of them is the undead looking gnoll?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That guy. I would like to aim at the dude on the right, the one closest to you, and I will carry over my Hex that is still up since it lasts an hour, so for my bonus action I will cast Hex on that motherfuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I would like to use Eldritch Blast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Roll for the attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Plus six, that's a 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that hits. Go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice. This is a 1d10 plus four. That's 11 plus five points of necrotic damage for 16 total.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 points of damage, all right. As it's standing on this upper portion of the rock floor, it glances back as you guys enter. You guys see a flash of light from the arcing of the arcane energy as it streaks across and slams into its body just in time to see another shadowed shape emerging out of this tunnel to join the fray. As it falls back (snarling, chattering). That's going to end the initial round of combat. Now we're into the initiative order. At the top of this, you guys glance over and the four of you, at least, see this shape begin to emerge from around the wall. You see this tall, spindly humanoid figure that begins to curve around the side. Khary, if you want to join the table. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Spindly, what?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You cast Blur. That all happens in a quick instant as they rushed forward and you guys caught up. Now we're rolling initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, on this guy there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys slowly bring your way to the base-- which in order to get you in the space where you can see them, that would put both of you rushing right down to the base in that area. If I can get a marching order to where the rest of you are, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, I'll be in the back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll take the front.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's take a line of the three of us, at least.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep. I'm good with that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys rush forward to take the line as they--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Linemen.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll be back with Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I knew what that meant.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You going to be a guard or a tackle?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Tackle. I'm probably a guard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you all rush in below, you both release Sacred Flame and Toll the Dead on the guy in the blue. That's a wisdom saving throw for Sacred Flame, I believe it is?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's a dex save for Sacred Flame and a wisdom save for Toll the Dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right. A wisdom save for you, that's a 13?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it succeeds. Sorry. For you, it's 13 as well for your DC. That is a five.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You couldn't have them roll that for me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sorry. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's Crystal Pepsi.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I really love Crystal Pepsi.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Original run.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll damage for the Sacred Flame, which should be-- What's the damage on the spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: The damage on the Sacred Flame is-- The spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so it's 1d8. Go ahead and roll 1d8 radiant damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: 1d8 is this thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: One.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ugh. That's okay. It was for visual anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: It was. That's true. I would have wanted the--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch the light burst in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I've pulled the ripcord on Blur if they're doing that.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You're holding it and it's not close enough. I need you all to roll initiative now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Got nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Waiting to beat face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're all staying right there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I mean, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Should we creep forward a little? What should we do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. We're going to have to fan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I guess Fjord and I will take a good ten feet or so up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They might see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you're going closer?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're getting really close to the manticore.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, maybe the other side of the tunnel so they don't see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He's got a distance weapon anyway, there's really no such thing as a bad--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You can see me doing this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Will you put Fjord towards me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, this way?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, pull him to the other side. They're seeing me do arcane bullshit on the side while sweating.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anybody else preparing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll stand next to Caleb on the inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm really, at this point, only useful for a couple things. I'm going to keep in the back there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Shakäste, anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I got my Vicious Mockery rolling.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: I would like for Anastasia to fly to the other side of the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Whereabout?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: No those stalagmites over-- yeah, there you go. Hide in those crags over there by the-- that's it. Keep a good eye. Good girl.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (humming drone) All righty. The manticore begins to clomp up the steps.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Airborne?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, on foot at the moment like (impact sounds).

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We'll just wait for Nott. Go Nott go.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: When do I go?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, right now as the manticore crests the top of the stairs, the large, joker-like, toothy grin of the female manticore glances up right towards all of you and goes (growls).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I attack her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not within range of you yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Not within range? Then I don't do it yet.
